lessons.title: Introduction to Azure Cloud Shell
lessons.content_md:
In this module, you learn what Azure Cloud Shell does, how it works, and when you should choose to use Azure Cloud Shell as a solution to meet your organization’s needs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/intro-to-azure-cloud-shell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Deploy Azure infrastructure by using JSON ARM templates
lessons.content_md:
Write JSON Azure Resource Manager templates by using Visual Studio Code to deploy your infrastructure to Azure consistently and reliably.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/create-azure-resource-manager-template-vs-code/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy Azure infrastructure by using JSON ARM templates

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica AZ-104: Prerequisites for Azure administrators
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **AZ-104: Prerequisites for Azure administrators**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
